faqs.question: How much does rat extermination cost in Passaic, NJ?
faqs.answer: Rat extermination services in Passaic typically range from $350 to $600, depending on the severity of the infestation, property size, and treatment required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work, ensuring transparent pricing with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a rat problem in Passaic?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for rat emergencies in Passaic. Our team understands that rat infestations require immediate attention, and we prioritize rapid response times to prevent property damage and health risks to your family or customers.

faqs.question: What does your rat extermination service include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive rat extermination includes a thorough inspection, identification of entry points, strategic trap and bait station placement, removal of rats, sanitation recommendations, exclusion services to seal entry points, and follow-up visits to ensure complete elimination and prevent future infestations.

faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and proven methods that are safe for families, pets, and employees when applied by our licensed technicians.
